nodes.label: Backend State Machine Tests for Work Order Approval Workflow  This module implem
Work order status enumeration - matches backend state definition.
Raised when an invalid state transition is attempted.
Raised when attempting to modify an immutable record.
Immutable approval history record.          Attributes:         id: Unique ident
Work order entity with state machine support.          Attributes:         id: U
Transition work order to a new status.                  Args:             target
Generate a unique history ID (simplified for testing).
Map target status to action name.
In-memory repository for approval history records.
Find all history records for a work order.
Provide a clean in-memory history repository.
Provide a work order in PENDING status.
Provide a work order in IN_REVIEW status.
Provide a work order in APPROVED status (terminal).
Provide a work order in REJECTED status (terminal).
ATB-1: Verify state machine enforces valid transition paths.          Happy Path
Test valid transition: PENDING → IN_REVIEW                  Expectation: Transit
Test valid transition: IN_REVIEW → APPROVED                  Expectation: Transi
Test valid transition: IN_REVIEW → REJECTED                  Expectation: Transi
Test invalid path: PENDING → APPROVED                  Expectation: InvalidState
Test invalid path: REJECTED → APPROVED (no reversal)                  Expectatio
Test that APPROVED (terminal) state cannot transition.                  Expectat
Test that REJECTED (terminal) state cannot transition.                  Expectat
Test that CANCELLED (terminal) state cannot transition.                  Expecta
Test complete approval workflow: PENDING → IN_REVIEW → APPROVED
ATB-2: Verify approval history immutability and completeness.          Requireme
Test that history records cannot be modified after creation.                  Ex
Test that each state transition creates a complete history record.
Test querying history records by work order ID.                  Expectation: On
Test that multiple transitions create a chronological history.
ATB-3: Verify API endpoint contracts using mock HTTP clients.          Endpoints
Provide valid auth header for approver.
Provide auth header for non-approver user.
Test that non-approver receives 403 Forbidden.                  Expectation: 403
Test idempotency: double approval returns 409 Conflict.                  Expecta
Test that rejection without comment is accepted.                  Expectation: 2
Test approval on work order not in IN_REVIEW state.                  Expectation
Mock API client for testing API contracts.          Simulates backend state and
Extract user role from auth header.
Ensure work order exists in mock store.
ATB-4: Verify concurrent approval requests are handled safely.          Requirem
Test that concurrent approval attempts result in exactly one success.
Test concurrent claim attempts on same work order.                  Expectation:
Test that approval + concurrent reject results in one success, one conflict.
Additional edge case tests for robustness.
Test operations on non-existent work order.
Test that empty comments are accepted.
Test that status enum values are correct strings.
Test that new work orders have PENDING status by default.
